englishDefinitions: Alfred Hitchcock, a famous British film director known for suspenseful thriller films
persianTranslation: آلفرد هیچکاک، کارگردان مشهور فیلم‌های دلهره‌آور
examples: Hitchcock is famous for making suspense feel elegant and controlled.
Many film students study Hitchcock's camera techniques.
The movie was inspired by the style of Hitchcock.
